{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Imperial box
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial box]] is a private area for Patrons, administrators, and [[Imperial]] guests.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
